# CimdDocumentCache constructor

Creates the cache.

```csharp
public CimdDocumentCache(Func<string, bool>? trustHost = null, Func<long>? now = null)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| trustHost | OPTIONAL host-domain trust policy; a document whose `client_id` host fails this predicate is never cached or returned (R-23.12-l). Defaults to trusting all hosts. |
| now | OPTIONAL clock (epoch ms) for testing; defaults to UtcNow. |
